case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC VS. ANTHONY JENKINS ET AL

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, ANTHONY AN INDIVIDUAL ALVAREZ, KAREN AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENKINS, ANTHONY AN INDIVIDUAL ALVAREZ, KAREN AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 14 CASTELO AVENUE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
